calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-17-2016 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-09-2015 Set For Trial On Dec-12-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion In Support Of Jerrold Bocci, M.D.S Motion To Compel Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Jami B. Tencati of Hassard Bonnington LLP. 415-288-9800. No other appearance.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JERROLD BOCCI's Motion In Support Of Jerrold Bocci, M.D.S Motion To Compel Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions is granted. No opposition was filed. Monetary sanctions are awarded to defendant in the sum of $860.00 to be paid within 20 day of service of this order with notice of entry. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2015 Set For Trial On Jul-05-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Dec-09-2015 Off Calendar
